aliases_seen: cylinder bore distortion; bore deformation; bore roundness error
one_line_definition: Deviation of the cylinder bore from a perfect circle, described by Fourier harmonic decomposition; caused by bolt clamping, thermal loads, and combustion pressure

aliases_seen: Fourier order analysis; harmonic analysis; Fourier series; harmonic orders
one_line_definition: Decomposition of bore cross-section radial deviation into orders: 0=diameter change, 1=eccentricity, 2=oval, 3=three-lobe, 4=cloverleaf, 6=six-lobe; dominant orders indicate cause

aliases_seen: piston ring conformability; ring conformance; ring-bore contact
one_line_definition: Ability of a piston ring to elastically deform and follow the bore shape under its tangential load; quantified by Dunaevsky, GOETZE (Müller), or Tomanik criteria

aliases_seen: Tomanik formula; Umax criterion
one_line_definition: Ring conformability criterion: Umax = 10(i·k·r²−1) per harmonic order; % sealing = 113 − ub/Umax; developed by Eduardo Tomanik at Mahle

aliases_seen: GOETZE formula; Müller formula; Aω criterion
one_line_definition: Ring conformability criterion: Aω = 1.52·Q·r³/[E·h·t³·(ω²−1)²]; maximum conformable amplitude for harmonic order ω; attributed to GOETZE/Müller

aliases_seen: Dunaevsky formula
one_line_definition: Ring conformability criterion based on beam-on-elastic-foundation theory; overestimates conformability for k>2 due to Critical Curvature Assumption; less accurate at higher orders than GOETZE

aliases_seen: thermal distortion; thermal deformation; thermally-induced bore distortion
one_line_definition: Bore distortion caused by non-uniform temperature distribution in the cylinder block; dominant distortion source in fired engine conditions; primarily 2nd-order (oval)

aliases_seen: bolt pretension distortion; assembly distortion; head bolt distortion
one_line_definition: Bore distortion caused by cylinder head bolt clamping forces; predominantly 4th-order (cloverleaf) for 4-bolt engines, 6th-order for 6-bolt heavy-diesel engines

aliases_seen: multi-layer steel gasket; metallic gasket; MLS; stopper MLS; active MLS
one_line_definition: Multi-layer steel cylinder head gasket; lower bore distortion than composite gasket due to more uniform sealing bead pressure distribution; stopper MLS vs active MLS give different bore distortion outcomes

aliases_seen: ABAQUS; Abaqus; nonlinear FEA
one_line_definition: Commercial finite element analysis software used for bore distortion prediction; supports contact pairs, bolt pretension, gasket elements, and thermal loading

aliases_seen: ANSYS
one_line_definition: Commercial finite element analysis software used for bore distortion and thermal analysis

aliases_seen: Enchometer; PAT Enchometer; bore measurement instrument
one_line_definition: Contact probe instrument for measuring bore roundness at multiple axial planes in assembled engine; reference to fixed centerline; resolution ~1 µm

aliases_seen: Incometer; V-INCOMETER; in-cylinder bore measurement
one_line_definition: Bore measurement instrument using 8 inductive sensors at 45° intervals; measures bore shape at multiple axial depths; used for validation of FEA predictions

aliases_seen: hot bore honing; thermally-compensated honing
one_line_definition: Cylinder bore honing performed with the engine block heated to operating temperature to compensate for thermal bore distortion in service; produces correct bore shape at operating temperature

aliases_seen: conical liner; elliptical liner; pre-distorted liner
one_line_definition: Cylinder liner manufactured with intentional non-circular and/or non-cylindrical cold-state geometry to compensate for in-service bore distortion, resulting in a more circular bore under fired conditions

aliases_seen: lube oil consumption; LOC; oil consumption measurement
one_line_definition: Loss of lubricating oil past the piston ring pack into the combustion chamber; increased by poor ring conformability, bore distortion, and thin oil films; measured by sulfur tracer or radioactive tracer methods

aliases_seen: blowby; combustion gas blow-by
one_line_definition: Leakage of combustion gases past the piston ring pack into the crankcase; caused by incomplete ring-bore sealing due to bore distortion, ring gaps, or ring non-conformability

aliases_seen: lateral piston motion; piston slap; piston tilt
one_line_definition: Translational and rotational motion of the piston perpendicular to the cylinder axis; driven by side thrust from connecting rod; causes impact noise (piston slap) and affects oil film distribution

aliases_seen: ultrasonic oil film measurement; acoustic measurement; piezoelectric sensor
one_line_definition: Non-invasive technique using ultrasound pulse-echo to measure lubricant film thickness between piston/ring and bore; employs reflection coefficient vs film thickness calibration

aliases_seen: EXCITE Power Unit; ring-pack simulation
one_line_definition: Commercial software for piston ring-pack dynamics and oil consumption simulation; does not natively include ring conformability to non-circular bores

aliases_seen: conjugate heat transfer; CHT; coolant flow simulation
one_line_definition: Computational fluid dynamics analysis of coolant flow and heat transfer in engine water jacket; provides temperature boundary conditions for structural FEA bore distortion analysis

aliases_seen: laser surface texturing; LST; micro-dimples; surface features
one_line_definition: Deliberate introduction of micro-scale surface features (dimples, grooves) on liner or ring surfaces to improve lubrication and reduce friction

aliases_seen: Rk; Rpk; Rvk; reduced peak height; reduced valley depth
one_line_definition: ISO 13565 surface roughness parameters describing the core roughness depth (Rk), reduced peak height (Rpk), and reduced valley depth (Rvk) of a honed bore surface

aliases_seen: ring-liner tribology; compression ring; oil control ring
one_line_definition: Study of friction, wear, and lubrication between piston rings and cylinder liner; covers boundary, mixed, and hydrodynamic lubrication regimes across the engine stroke

aliases_seen: EHL; EHD; elastohydrodynamic lubrication; oil film
one_line_definition: Formation of a continuous lubricant film between ring/piston and bore under hydrodynamic pressure; prevents metal-to-metal contact

aliases_seen: bolt preload; head bolt tightening; bolt torque
one_line_definition: Clamping force applied to cylinder head bolts during assembly; calculated from tightening torque via torque coefficient K; primary mechanical driver of 4th-order bore distortion

aliases_seen: in-cylinder measurement; instrumented piston; Invar piston
one_line_definition: Measurement of cylinder bore shape during actual engine operation using sensors embedded in a special piston; captures combined thermal + mechanical + combustion-pressure distortion

aliases_seen: FEA workflow; simulation methodology; CAE methodology
one_line_definition: Sequential or coupled CFD→thermal→structural FEA workflow for bore distortion prediction; includes gasket characterisation, bolt pretension, thermal loading, and post-processing with Fourier decomposition

aliases_seen: coolant jacket; water jacket geometry; cooling system
one_line_definition: Design of the cylinder block coolant passages; geometry affects both cooling efficiency and mechanical stiffness, both of which influence bore distortion

aliases_seen: liner thickness; cylinder liner design
one_line_definition: Radial wall thickness of the cylinder liner; thicker liners reduce bore distortion transmission from block; diminishing returns above ~40% increase

aliases_seen: skirt-liner tribology; piston skirt film; skirt EHL
one_line_definition: Lubrication between the piston skirt and cylinder liner; affected by piston secondary motion, oil supply, and temperature; measured ultrasonically or by LIF

aliases_seen: piston assembly friction; mechanical friction; FMEP
one_line_definition: Friction losses in the piston-ring-liner system; power cylinder assembly accounts for ~45% of total engine mechanical friction; reduced by surface texturing, lubricant optimisation, and bore shape control

aliases_seen: CGI; vermicular graphite iron
one_line_definition: Cast iron alloy with vermicular graphite morphology; intermediate thermal/mechanical properties between grey iron and ductile iron; used in diesel engine cylinder blocks for bore distortion resistance

aliases_seen: Talyrond; surface form measurement; roundness measurement
one_line_definition: Contact roundness measurement instrument from Taylor Hobson; outputs 2000-point circumferential radius-vs-angle data files used as input to bore analysis tools

aliases_seen: KIVA3; combustion simulation; in-cylinder CFD
one_line_definition: Multi-dimensional CFD code for in-cylinder combustion and heat transfer simulation; used to generate thermal boundary conditions for piston ring/liner thermal analysis

aliases_seen: piston elasticity; structural compliance; piston deformation
one_line_definition: FEA-generated matrix relating contact forces at piston surface grid points to resulting piston deformations; enables elastic piston model within piston dynamics simulations

aliases_seen: titanium nitride coating; hard coating; ring coating
one_line_definition: Hard ceramic coating (TiN, ~3 µm) applied to piston ring sealing face to reduce wear and improve thermal resistance; increases ring temperature by 3–5°C compared to uncoated ring

aliases_seen: oil inertia effect; qi mechanism
one_line_definition: Oil transport mechanism near TDC where gas pressure below second land exceeds combustion pressure, causing oil film inversion and oil entry into combustion chamber; dominant low-friction ring LOC mechanism

aliases_seen: intra-bore water passage; drilled intrabore
one_line_definition: Manufacturing modification replacing open water jacket sand core with drilled passages between cylinder bores; reduces manufacturing cost but creates stagnant coolant regions and worsens thermal bore distortion

aliases_seen: FEA substructure; Craig-Bampton reduction
one_line_definition: FEA model reduction technique condensing a complex substructure into a reduced stiffness matrix; used by Soua et al. to reduce FEA model size while retaining local bore distortion accuracy

aliases_seen: split-piston bore measurement; rotatable crown measurement
one_line_definition: Experimental technique for measuring cylinder bore deformation using a piston with a rotatable crown equipped with a clearance sensor; scans 360° by rotating the crown via external spindle

aliases_seen: SO2 tracer method; per-cylinder LOC
one_line_definition: Oil consumption measurement technique injecting sulfur-doped oil and measuring SO2 concentration in individual cylinder exhaust; provides per-cylinder LOC data

aliases_seen: BAT; bore shape analysis software
one_line_definition: Excel-based tool (Paul Gibbs, Lotus 2001) for processing Talyrond bore measurement data through Gaussian filtering, FFT harmonic decomposition, and Tomanik ring conformability iteration to produce sealing percentage and gap area outputs

aliases_seen: cambore; cam bore; main bearing bore distortion
one_line_definition: Distortion of crankshaft main bearing bore and camshaft bore under assembly loads; analysed by the same Fourier decomposition methods as cylinder bore distortion

aliases_seen: oil film cavitation; gaseous cavitation; film rupture
one_line_definition: Formation and collapse of vapour/gas cavities in the lubricant film under rapidly changing pressure; causes lubricant starvation and affects ring-liner friction and film thickness

aliases_seen: tribochemical film; ZDDP tribofilm; boundary film
one_line_definition: Thin chemically-reactive layer formed on metal surfaces by lubricant additives (e.g. ZDDP) under boundary lubrication conditions; reduces wear rate significantly

aliases_seen: circular cylinder vibration; shell frequencies
one_line_definition: Natural frequency analysis of thin-walled cylindrical shells using Donnell or Flügge shell theory; relevant to liner vibration and noise under in-cylinder pressure excitation

aliases_seen: detonation; knock; auto-ignition
one_line_definition: Abnormal combustion caused by auto-ignition of end-gases ahead of the flame front; linked to cylinder temperature distribution and water jacket efficiency

aliases_seen: ISO 11562 filter; bore data filter
one_line_definition: Low-pass filter applied to bore measurement data to remove high-frequency surface roughness while retaining form harmonics (orders 1–8); standardised in ISO 11562
